title: T-017 — API: Allergen profile CRUD (POST/DELETE /api/technical/items/:code/allergens)
prompt: Implement allergen profile endpoints per §10.1 + V-TEC-40..42. POST /api/technical/items/[item_code]/allergens body: { allergen_code, source, intensity?, confidence?, manual_override_reason? }. PUT updates an existing entry. DELETE removes (admin/quality_lead only). Validate: V-TEC-40 allergen_code exists in reference_tables.allergens_reference; V-TEC-42 manual_override requires non-empty reason. Audit log every mutation. RED tests/api/allergen-profile.test.ts. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/api/allergen-profile.test.ts`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Allergen profile create/update/delete endpoints with override reason validation.
pipeline_inputs.details: PUT path identifies row by composite (org_id,item_id,allergen_code). source='manual_override' forces reason field. Permission technical.allergens.edit. Action labels: allergen.create / allergen.update / allergen.override / allergen.delete in audit_log.
acceptance_criteria: Given POST with allergen_code not in reference_tables, when validated, then 422 V-TEC-40.
Given POST source='manual_override' without reason, when validated, then 422 V-TEC-42.
Given DELETE manual_override row, when audit queried, then action='allergen.delete' row exists with old payload.
Given user without technical.allergens.edit, when POST runs, then 403.
test_strategy: RED tests for V-TEC-40, V-TEC-42, audit emit, RBAC.
risk_red_lines: Do not silently overwrite manual_override rows (preserved by cascade rule).
